title: crispy aero moroccan shrimp mechoui
description: Moroccan-inspired, aerated shrimp dish with spicy shrimp paste, inspired by the traditional Mechoui form.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together shrimp paste, shrimp, olive oil, onion, ginger, cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper or a silicone mat.
Using your hands, shape the shrimp mixture into a flat disk, about 1 inch (2.5 cm) thick.
Transfer the disk to the prepared baking sheet and fold the edges of the parchment paper or silicone mat to create a "mechoui" shape.
Bake for 15 minutes, then reduce the oven temperature to 375°F (190°C) and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove from the oven and brush with lemon juice.
Let cool for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
